news.title:
Cyient Ltd. falls for 5th session, hitting a 52-week low at Rs 781.
Decline attributed to broader market slowdown as of 24 Mar 2026.
news.summary:
Cyient Ltd. falls for 5th session, hitting a 52-week low at Rs 781.
Decline attributed to broader market slowdown as of 24 Mar 2026.

news.title:
Cyient shares rose nearly 5% after partnering with Prospecta to develop a master data management platform for asset-intensive industries.
The solution aims to harmonize operational data, improve analytics, predictive maintenance, and reduce maintenance costs globally. Cyient's stock traded at ₹898.75, up 4.7%.
news.summary:
Cyient shares rose nearly 5% after partnering with Prospecta to develop a master data management platform for asset-intensive industries.
The solution aims to harmonize operational data, improve analytics, predictive maintenance, and reduce maintenance costs globally. Cyient's stock traded at ₹898.75, up 4.7%.

news.title:
Cyient partners with Prospecta for Master Data Management to enhance mining, energy, and transportation sectors.
Unified master data boosts operational efficiency, AI adoption, cost reduction, asset uptime, and compliance.
news.summary:
Cyient partners with Prospecta for Master Data Management to enhance mining, energy, and transportation sectors.
Unified master data boosts operational efficiency, AI adoption, cost reduction, asset uptime, and compliance.

news.title: NCLT begins liquidation process for Infotech Hal Ltd, appoints Mr. Vasudevan Gopu as liquidator.
news.summary: NCLT begins liquidation process for Infotech Hal Ltd, appoints Mr. Vasudevan Gopu as liquidator.

news.title:
NCLT Bengaluru initiates liquidation of Cyient-HAL 50:50 JV.
Mr. Vasudevan Gopu appointed liquidator; order received March 3, 2026.
news.summary:
NCLT Bengaluru initiates liquidation of Cyient-HAL 50:50 JV.
Mr. Vasudevan Gopu appointed liquidator; order received March 3, 2026.

news.title:
Cyient Ltd appoints Mr. Shrinivas Kulkarni as CFO and Mr. Prabhakar Atla as COO, effective April 1, 2026.
Both executives will collaborate to ensure seamless FY2026 account closure during their transition period.
news.summary:
Cyient Ltd appoints Mr. Shrinivas Kulkarni as CFO and Mr. Prabhakar Atla as COO, effective April 1, 2026.
Both executives will collaborate to ensure seamless FY2026 account closure during their transition period.

news.title:
Cyient Ltd's subsidiary CDS Lavender Holdings Inc. was incorporated in Delaware, USA.
This move aims to expand its corporate structure in the Aerospace Defense sector.
news.summary:
Cyient Ltd's subsidiary CDS Lavender Holdings Inc. was incorporated in Delaware, USA.
This move aims to expand its corporate structure in the Aerospace Defense sector.

news.title:
Cyient Ltd announced management participation in Kotak and IIFL conferences in Mumbai, February 2026.
No unpublished price-sensitive information will be shared; details available on Cyient's website.
news.summary:
Cyient Ltd announced management participation in Kotak and IIFL conferences in Mumbai, February 2026.
No unpublished price-sensitive information will be shared; details available on Cyient's website.

news.title: Motilal Oswal issues a Sell report on Cyient, CMP at 1085.9.
news.summary: Motilal Oswal issues a Sell report on Cyient, CMP at 1085.9.

news.title:
Cyient expects high single-digit revenue growth in FY27, driven by digital engineering and technology business.
Semiconductor business aims to be EBIT neutral by FY27, supported by strategic initiatives and acquisitions.
news.summary:
Cyient expects high single-digit revenue growth in FY27, driven by digital engineering and technology business.
Semiconductor business aims to be EBIT neutral by FY27, supported by strategic initiatives and acquisitions.

news.title:
Cyient projects improved H2 margins over H1 for this fiscal year.
This indicates positive trends in Cyient's financial performance.
news.summary:
Cyient projects improved H2 margins over H1 for this fiscal year.
This indicates positive trends in Cyient's financial performance.

news.title:
Cyient targets a 15% EBIT margin for its DET business by Q4 FY27.
Management confirms they are on track to achieve this medium-term target.
news.summary:
Cyient targets a 15% EBIT margin for its DET business by Q4 FY27.
Management confirms they are on track to achieve this medium-term target.

news.title:
Cyient Ltd grants 1,94,700 stock options under three plans.
Includes 79,700 from 2020 RSU, 95,000 from 2021, and 20,000 from 2023 plans.
news.summary:
Cyient Ltd grants 1,94,700 stock options under three plans.
Includes 79,700 from 2020 RSU, 95,000 from 2021, and 20,000 from 2023 plans.

news.title:
Cyient's Q3 net profit drops 28% to ₹91.8 crore, while revenue rises 3.8% to ₹1,848.5 crore.
EBIT grows 13.6% to ₹167 crore, with margins improving to 9% from 8.2%.
news.summary:
Cyient's Q3 net profit drops 28% to ₹91.8 crore, while revenue rises 3.8% to ₹1,848.5 crore.
EBIT grows 13.6% to ₹167 crore, with margins improving to 9% from 8.2%.

news.title:
Cyient Ltd acquired majority stake in Kinetic Technologies to enhance IC design capabilities.
Partnered with Navitas, launched smart meter chip with Azimuth AI, and posted double-digit margin growth.
news.summary:
Cyient Ltd acquired majority stake in Kinetic Technologies to enhance IC design capabilities.
Partnered with Navitas, launched smart meter chip with Azimuth AI, and posted double-digit margin growth.

news.title:
Cyient Ltd to announce Q3 FY26 results on Jan 22, 2026, followed by an earnings call.
Senior management will host the call at 5:30 PM IST; global dial-in details provided.
news.summary:
Cyient Ltd to announce Q3 FY26 results on Jan 22, 2026, followed by an earnings call.
Senior management will host the call at 5:30 PM IST; global dial-in details provided.

news.title:
Cyient Ltd announces recording of the conference call on its acquisition of majority stake in Kinetic Technologies.
The recording is available on Cyient's website under the investors' financial information section.
news.summary:
Cyient Ltd announces recording of the conference call on its acquisition of majority stake in Kinetic Technologies.
The recording is available on Cyient's website under the investors' financial information section.

news.title:
Cyient aims to double its semiconductor business by FY27.
This highlights the company's ambitious growth plans in a thriving sector.
news.summary:
Cyient aims to double its semiconductor business by FY27.
This highlights the company's ambitious growth plans in a thriving sector.

news.title:
Cyient's Kinetic Tech acquisition to be EBIT accretive from year one.
The deal will double Cyient Semicon's revenue and be EPS accretive from year two.
news.summary:
Cyient's Kinetic Tech acquisition to be EBIT accretive from year one.
The deal will double Cyient Semicon's revenue and be EPS accretive from year two.

news.title:
Stocks in focus include Ola Electric, L&T, NTPC, Titagarh Rail, and Cyient, among others.
Sensex fell 0.14% to 84,559.7, Nifty declined 0.16% to 25,818.6; realty, FMCG lagged, IT, metals gained.
news.summary:
Stocks in focus include Ola Electric, L&T, NTPC, Titagarh Rail, and Cyient, among others.
Sensex fell 0.14% to 84,559.7, Nifty declined 0.16% to 25,818.6; realty, FMCG lagged, IT, metals gained.
